title: rawhide: parallel build flake is back
body:
Seen twice in CI in the past month, and once [in gating](https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/9f4c95ac-97b5-42a7-89c2-74c5801565c8/work-tests.yml3ly3uno9/tests-ez3228fq/test.podman-rootless.bats.log):
```
not ok 216 [070] podman parallel build should not race
...
# Error: i02: image not known
```
Hypothesis: this _may_ be a different manifestation of #21504, the rawhide hang. Unfortunately it is currently impossible to debug, because `build` output is devnulled. I will look into a way to instrument the test.

* rawhide : sys podman rawhide rootless host sqlite
    * [02-09 16:43](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/6641158592397312/logs/main.log#t--00216) in [sys] [070] podman parallel build should not race
    * [01-27 20:58](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/6038924317949952/logs/main.log#t--00215) in [sys] [070] podman parallel build should not race

| x | x | x | x | x | x |
| ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| sys(2) | podman(2) | rawhide(2) | rootless(2) | host(2) | sqlite(2) |

comments.body:
[Caught it](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/5628174566948864/logs/main.log). As suspected, it is the rawhide hang. (Search in-page for "log.09"):
```
# /tmp/podman_bats.SAIMCY/log.09 :
# STEP 1/2: FROM quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123
# STEP 2/2: RUN echo hi
# hi
# timeout: sending signal TERM to command ‘/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman’
...
# Error: i09: image not known
```
Based on this one data point, I am reassigning this and the other two (above) instances to #21504, and closing this.
